title: Marble Topic Content
description: The teaching + assessment 'flesh' layered on top of a taxonomy micro-topic (the 'skeleton'). One file per topic id. Generated by an LLM grounded in the taxonomy fields + OER, then human-reviewed. Layers cleanly on top of the ODbL/CC-BY-SA taxonomy.

standards.description: Copied from the topic — the authoritative anchor for accuracy review.

prerequisites.description: Hard-prerequisite topic ids, from the dependency graph.

parent.description: Parent-app content: orientation and coaching, not kid-facing.

watchFor.description: Common misconceptions / error patterns to catch.

practice.description: Drill items. Either code-generated (preferred where possible — answers correct by construction) or a static bank.

generator.description: Key into scripts/generators.mjs GENERATORS. Answers computed by code, never by a model.

items.description: Static fallback items when no generator applies.

masteryCriteria.description: Copied/derived from the topic's evidence[] — the definition of done.

kind.description: numeric/mcq auto-grade; constructed needs a rubric judge (parent checkbox or LLM-as-judge).

rubric.description: For constructed items: checkable criteria derived from evidence, given to the judge.

evidenceRef.description: Index into the topic's evidence[] this item tests.

provenance.description: Accuracy audit trail. Nothing ships to a child with reviewed:false.

grounding.description: OER / authoritative sources the generator was grounded in (RAG). verified=true only once actually fetched and checked.

verification.description: Automated checks that passed (e.g. 'answers code-checked', 'facts cross-checked vs standard').

license.description: e.g. CC-BY-SA-4.0 — inherits the taxonomy's share-alike spirit.
